description: Frozen tamper-evident receipt of one HIL gate decision.

card_id.description: UUID4 of the DecisionCard the operator was reviewing.
card_id.title: Card Id

decision_card_digest.description: Lowercase sha256 bound to card content, trial, issuance time, and nonce.
decision_card_digest.title: Decision Card Digest

gate_id.description: Gate identifier (for example G2C, G3, G4).
gate_id.title: Gate Id

revise_count.description: Per-slide revision count; fourth revise is refused by Story 7a.4 guard.
revise_count.title: Revise Count

trial_id.description: UUID4 identity for the enclosing trial run.
trial_id.title: Trial Id

verb.description: Closed enum: approve | edit | reject | select. `select` is the BETA picker verb (surgical overlay of a per-gate selection onto the existing envelope); `edit` remains full-replace (party-ratified Option B, T5b 2026-06-19).
verb.title: Verb

verdict_id.description: UUID4 identity for this verdict receipt.
verdict_id.title: Verdict Id

title: OperatorVerdict
